result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 11:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ch.oldvalue__c IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '')
    END AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT t.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
) t
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
) h
  ON h.agent_id = t.agent_id
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ch.oldvalue__c IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '')
    END AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT t.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
) t
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
) h
  ON h.agent_id = t.agent_id
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ch.oldvalue__c IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '')
    END AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT

    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL

SELECT t.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
) t
JOIN (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases

  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0

  ON h.agent_id = t.agent_id
ORDER BY t.transfer_count ASC, t.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT tc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM transfer_counts tc
JOIN handled_counts hc ON hc.agent_id = tc.agent_id
ORDER BY tc.transfer_count ASC, tc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT tc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM transfer_counts tc
JOIN handled_counts hc ON hc.agent_id = tc.agent_id
ORDER BY tc.transfer_count ASC, tc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_ts, MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_ts FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner';

exec_args.sql: SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_ts, MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_ts FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner';

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN field__c='Owner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS owner_rows FROM casehistory__c;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN field__c='Owner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS owner_rows FROM casehistory__c;

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
), handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND btrim(agent_id) <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) ASC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
